---
title: "The Governess, or, Little Female Academy: Being the history of Mrs. Teachum, and her nine girls "
---

## The Governess, or, Little Female Academy: Being the history of Mrs. Teachum, and her nine girls 

**Author:** Sarah Fielding
**Date:** 1749
**Imprint:** London: Millar

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
